articles.title: Former Prince Andrew Arrested on Suspicion of Misconduct
articles.description: British police arrested Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, formerly Prince Andrew, on suspicion of misconduct in public office linked to his past association with Jeffrey Epstein. Authorities searched his residences and released him under investigation.

articles.title: Ex-Prince Andrew Could Face Life Imprisonment if Charged
articles.description: Although not formally charged, legal experts say former Prince Andrew could face a maximum life sentence if convicted of misconduct in public office.

articles.title: Royal Family in “Unchartered Territory” Over Epstein Ties
articles.description: Continued revelations from the Epstein files have intensified scrutiny on the British royal family’s handling of Andrew’s ties to the convicted sex offender.

articles.title: 8 Backcountry Skiers Found Dead After Sierra Avalanche
articles.description: A severe storm near Lake Tahoe triggered a massive avalanche that killed eight backcountry skiers and left one missing.

articles.title: Trump Orders Release of UFO and Alien Files
articles.description: Former U.S. President Trump directed federal agencies to release previously classified files related to UFOs and extraterrestrial life.

articles.title: Governors Group Skips White House Meeting After Dispute
articles.description: A group of U.S. state governors announced they would not attend a White House dinner after political disagreements with the administration.
